surgicalSpecialists.title: Find trusted surgical specialists
surgicalSpecialists.description: Explore qualified plastic surgeons, maxillofacial surgeons, ENT surgeons, and reconstructive surgeons on Esthetic Match.
surgicalSpecialists.sideCardText: Browse doctors whose profiles match advanced surgical specialties and compare their locations, ratings, and consultation options.
surgicalSpecialists.errorText: Please try again or browse all doctors.
surgicalSpecialists.emptyText: We could not find doctors matching these surgical specialties at the moment.

nonSurgicalSpecialists.title: Find trusted non-surgical aesthetic doctors
nonSurgicalSpecialists.description: Explore aesthetic doctors, dermatologists, ophthalmologists, dentists, orthodontists, general practitioners, and oculoplastic specialists on Esthetic Match.
nonSurgicalSpecialists.sideCardText: Compare qualified doctors offering aesthetic, dermatology, dental, ophthalmology, and general consultation services.
nonSurgicalSpecialists.errorText: Please try again or browse all doctors.
nonSurgicalSpecialists.emptyText: We could not find doctors matching these non-surgical specialties at the moment.

nearme.title: Aesthetic doctors near you
nearme.description: Allow location access and we'll show qualified practitioners in your city first.
nearme.permissionCardText: Your browser will ask for permission. We only use your coordinates to find nearby doctors and do not store them from this page.
nearme.loadingDoctors: Matching you with doctors in your area...
nearme.deniedText: Please enable location access in your browser settings, then try again.
nearme.errorTitle: Could not load doctors near you
nearme.errorText: Please try again, or use the main doctor search page to choose your city manually.
nearme.noDoctorsTitle: No doctors found in your area yet
nearme.noDoctorsText: We could not find matching doctors in your current city. Try the full search page to browse all available practitioners.

expertise.title: Procedures
expertise.moreProcedures: +{count} more procedures available from this doctor.
expertise.moreAvailable: This doctor has more procedures available.
expertise.aria: Doctor procedures and areas of expertise

consultationPrices.title: Consultation Prices
consultationPrices.no prices: Doctor has not added any prices yet
consultationPrices.commissionInfo: Esthetic Match applies a 15% platform commission to paid consultations to support secure payments, messaging, and platform operations.
consultationPrices.emptyStateTitle: This doctor has not declared consultation prices yet.

booking.title: Booking Link
booking.description: Book a consultation directly with this doctor.

reviews.title: Google Reviews
reviews.notAllowed: The doctor has not allowed Google reviews yet.

doctorInstagramReels.singleDescription: Discover a closer look at the doctor's work, treatments and aesthetic approach through their latest featured Instagram content.
doctorInstagramReels.multipleDescription: Explore selected content from this doctor and discover more about their treatments, results and aesthetic approach.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.noImagesDescription: This doctor has not added any treatment transformation images yet.
gallery.moreDescription: More results are available on this doctor profile.

stickyContactBanner.title: Ask {doctorName} a question
stickyContactBanner.subtitle: Your medical advice is secured online

doctorInstagramReelsManagement.singleDescription: This interview video is currently linked to your public profile. You can remove it from your profile at any time.
doctorInstagramReelsManagement.watchDescription: Visitors can watch this video directly from your doctor profile.
doctorInstagramReelsManagement.multipleDescription: These interview videos are currently linked to your public profile. You can remove a video from your profile at any time.
doctorInstagramReelsManagement.emptyDescription: Contact our team to schedule a quick video interview, showcase your expertise and skills as a doctor, and have your story featured on your profile.
doctorInstagramReelsManagement.removeError: We couldn't remove this video. Please try again.
doctorInstagramReelsManagement.emailSubject: Personal interview video for my Esthetic Match profile

bookingConfirmation.inClinicSuccess: You can now view this doctor’s contact and clinic details.
bookingConfirmation.onlineSuccess: Your online consultation chat access is now active.
bookingConfirmation.pendingDescription: Stripe is still confirming your payment. This usually updates automatically after a few moments.
bookingConfirmation.chatUnlockedDescription: You can now message the doctor through your account.

publicDoctorReviews.title: What patients say
publicDoctorReviews.description: Reviews shared directly through Esthetic Match by patients invited to reflect on their experience.
publicDoctorReviews.reviewCount: {count, plural, one {Based on # review} other {Based on # reviews}}

socialMedia.title: Social media
socialMedia.description: Add the accounts you want patients to see. Hidden links remain saved but will not appear on your public profile.

newLink.title: New social link
newLink.description: Add one account at a time.

empty.title: No social links yet
empty.description: Add Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, or another account to help patients connect with you.

fields.visibilityHelp: You can hide a link without deleting it.

errors.load: Could not load your social media links.
errors.add: Could not add this social link.
errors.update: Could not update this social link.
errors.delete: Could not delete this social link.
